next_command:
1) Auto-instrument your entrypoint based on scan findings:
   assay patch .

2) Generate a proof pack:
   assay run -c receipt_completeness -- python your_app.py

3) Verify and lock your baseline:
   assay verify-pack ./proof_pack_*/
   assay lock init
